description: Pin versions in apk add. Instead of `apk add <package>` use `apk add <package>=<version>` to avoid unexpected package upgrades between builds.
Multiple consecutive RUN instructions. Each RUN creates a new image layer. Consolidate into a single RUN using && to reduce image size and layer count.
Consider using `find` instead of `ls` to better handle non-alphanumeric filenames in shell scripts.
